login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Login to your RIPS Admin account
login.agreeMessage: By clicking continue, you agree to our

usersPage.title: Workspace members
usersPage.description: Manage the users associated with the selected workspace.
usersPage.noWorkspaceDescription: Choose a workspace from the sidebar to view and manage its users.

dialog.title: Invite user
dialog.description: Send an invitation to a new user for this workspace.

empty.title: No members yet
empty.description: There are no users in this workspace. Invite new members to get started.

companyPage.description: Maintain DIAN required company data and service locations.
companyPage.requiredLocations: Add at least one service location before saving.
companyPage.emptyWorkspaceDescription: Choose a workspace to view and edit its company information.
companyPage.generalInfoDescription: Legal registration details required by DIAN.
companyPage.contactInfoDescription: Primary contact channels for the company.
companyPage.locationsDescription: Manage each habilitated location and its DIAN codes.

invoicesPage.title: Invoices
invoicesPage.description: View the status of invoices sent to DIAN.
invoicesPage.noAccessDescription: You need workspace admin permissions to manage invoices.

empty.title: No invoices yet
empty.useRipsWizard: Create a direct invoice or use the RIPS Wizard for invoices with health data.

detail.title: Invoice details
detail.description: Review the invoice information and current status.

invoiceDetails.noInvoiceAttemptsDescription: The invoice has not been sent to DIAN yet.
invoiceDetails.noRipsAttemptsDescription: RIPS have not been sent to SISPRO yet.
invoiceDetails.documentNotSupported: Not supported by the current provider
invoiceDetails.resendNotSupported: Resend requires PDF and one downloadable XML document.
invoiceDetails.partiallyAnnulledLockMessage: This invoice was already partially annulled with a credit note and cannot be credited again.
invoiceDetails.annulledLockMessage: This invoice was already annulled with a credit note and cannot be credited again.
invoiceDetails.retryConfirmDescription: The invoice will be re-sent to the DIAN orchestrator reusing the already-assigned number. Only Failed invoices without a CUFE can be retried.
invoiceDetails.retrySuccess: Retry queued. The invoice will show as Queued while it is processed.

clientsPage.title: Clients
clientsPage.description: Manage DIAN-compliant client records for the selected workspace.
clientsPage.emptyWorkspaceDescription: Choose a workspace to view and edit its clients.
clientsPage.listDescription: All clients configured for DIAN billing in this workspace.

dialog.createDescription: Enter the DIAN required details for the new client.
dialog.editDescription: Update the DIAN details for this client.

form.statusHint: Inactive clients remain stored but cannot be used for invoicing.

emptyState.title: No clients yet
emptyState.description: Add your first client to start issuing invoices.

patientsPage.title: Patients
patientsPage.description: Maintain patient identification data required by DIAN.
patientsPage.emptyWorkspaceDescription: Choose a workspace to view and edit its patients.
patientsPage.listDescription: All patients configured for the selected workspace.

form.statusHint: Inactive patients remain stored but cannot be used in new records.

emptyState.title: No patients yet
emptyState.description: Add your first patient to keep records up to date.

descriptions.consultas: Create reusable consultation payloads and insert them in the RIPS wizard with a single click.
descriptions.procedimientos: Store complex procedure data so the team can reuse accurate values every time.
descriptions.urgencias: Capture emergency care payloads ahead of time to avoid errors under pressure.
descriptions.hospitalizacion: Register hospitalization payloads that can be recalled when generating RIPS packages.
descriptions.recienNacidos: Prepare newborn service payloads that follow regulatory requirements.
descriptions.medicamentos: Define medication delivery payloads with dosage and billing details ready to reuse.
descriptions.otrosServicios: Save any other service payload you frequently report in RIPS submissions.

table.title: Saved services
table.description: Reusable payloads for {{category}} to speed up your RIPS wizard workflow.

empty.title: No {{category}} services yet
empty.description: Create your first service to reuse it directly in the RIPS wizard.

dialogs.description: Store preset payload values that will be available when building invoices and RIPS files.

delete.title: Delete service
delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

form.name: Name
form.isActiveDescription: Inactive services remain available but hidden when selecting defaults.
form.payloadHelp: Fill each RIPS field exactly as required for reuse in the wizard.

referenceOptions.codDiagnosticoCausaMuertePlaceholder: Select a cause of death diagnosis

form.calculatedFieldNote: Calculated automatically during the RIPS wizard.
form.validationError: Fix the highlighted fields before saving.

errors.loadTable: We couldn't load {{table}}. Try again later.

specialistsPage.title: Specialists
specialistsPage.description: Manage specialists linked to workspace users with DIAN-required data.
specialistsPage.emptyWorkspaceDescription: Choose a workspace to view and edit its specialists.
specialistsPage.listDescription: All specialists configured for the selected workspace.

dialog.createDescription: Link the specialist to a workspace user and complete the DIAN data.
dialog.editDescription: Update the DIAN details for this specialist.

form.statusHint: Inactive specialists remain stored but cannot be assigned.

emptyState.title: No specialists yet
emptyState.description: Add your first specialist to keep records up to date.

sisproPage.title: SISPRO integration
sisproPage.description: Store the SISPRO credentials and authenticate the workspace against the SISPRO service.
sisproPage.credentialsSectionDescription: Credentials are stored in plain text temporarily to support legacy systems.
sisproPage.tokenSectionDescription: Latest token returned by SISPRO after a successful login.
sisproPage.missingWorkspaceDescription: Choose a workspace to configure SISPRO access.

invoiceConfigurationPage.title: Invoice API
invoiceConfigurationPage.description: Store the API token used to integrate with the invoicing provider.
invoiceConfigurationPage.tokenPlaceholder: Paste the token provided by your invoicing provider
invoiceConfigurationPage.helperText: Updating this token will immediately replace the previous value.
invoiceConfigurationPage.loadError: Unable to load the invoice configuration.
invoiceConfigurationPage.saveError: We couldn't save the invoice token.
invoiceConfigurationPage.maskedValue: Token stored securely. Edit to view or update the value.
invoiceConfigurationPage.noToken: No token stored yet. Add a token to enable invoicing.
invoiceConfigurationPage.missingWorkspaceDescription: Choose a workspace to configure the invoice API.
invoiceConfigurationPage.providerHelperText: Select the provider to use for electronic invoicing.
invoiceConfigurationPage.tokenPlaceholderLedger: Enter the NIT registered with MatrixMD Ledger
invoiceConfigurationPage.noTokenLedger: No NIT configured. Enter the NIT to enable invoicing with Ledger.
invoiceConfigurationPage.maskedValueLedger: NIT stored securely. Edit to view or update the value.
invoiceConfigurationPage.ledgerEnvironmentHint: Ledger uses separate production and testing environments automatically based on your workspace environment setting.

resolutionsPage.title: Invoice Resolutions
resolutionsPage.description: Manage electronic invoicing resolutions authorized by DIAN.
resolutionsPage.listDescription: List of resolutions available for issuing electronic invoices.
resolutionsPage.createDescription: Enter the resolution data authorized by DIAN.
resolutionsPage.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this resolution? This action cannot be undone.
resolutionsPage.deleteError: Failed to delete resolution. If invoices have been issued, deactivate it instead.
resolutionsPage.emptyState: No resolutions configured. Add one to start invoicing.

form.technicalKeyHint: DIAN technical key for CUFE computation. Obtained from the habilitation certificate.

creditNoteResolutionsPage.title: Credit Note Resolutions
creditNoteResolutionsPage.description: Manage resolutions for issuing electronic credit notes.
creditNoteResolutionsPage.listDescription: List of available resolutions for issuing credit notes.
creditNoteResolutionsPage.createDescription: Enter the resolution data for credit notes.
creditNoteResolutionsPage.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this resolution? This action cannot be undone.
creditNoteResolutionsPage.loadError: Unable to load credit note resolutions.
creditNoteResolutionsPage.deleteError: Unable to delete the resolution. If credit notes have been issued, deactivate it instead.
creditNoteResolutionsPage.emptyState: No credit note resolutions configured. Add one to start issuing credit notes.

ripsWizard.title: RIPS Wizard
ripsWizard.description: Create and submit RIPS packages to SISPRO
ripsWizard.createInvoiceDescription: Select client and add optional notes
ripsWizard.configurationDescription: Select client, location and billing resolution
ripsWizard.noClients: No clients configured. Add clients in the Clients section.
ripsWizard.noLocations: No locations configured. Configure locations in the Company section.
ripsWizard.noResolutions: No active billing resolutions. Configure billing resolutions.
ripsWizard.missingConfiguration: You must select client, location and billing resolution
ripsWizard.missingClientEmail: The selected client has no email. Update the client's email before creating a health invoice.
ripsWizard.unifiedDescription: Create electronic invoice and send RIPS package in a single process
ripsWizard.draftQueued: The document was created and is queued for processing. The system will send the invoice to DIAN and then RIPS to SISPRO automatically.

environment.title: Environment
environment.description: Electronic invoicing and RIPS environment configuration
environment.selectEnvironmentDescription: Choose between testing or production environment for invoice and RIPS submission
environment.testingDescription: Testing environment to validate invoices and RIPS before submitting to DIAN
environment.testingNote: Invoices sent in this environment have no legal validity
environment.productionDescription: Production environment for official invoice and RIPS submission to DIAN
environment.productionNote: Invoices sent in this environment have legal and fiscal validity
environment.warningDescription: When changing environments, all invoices and RIPS will be sent to the newly selected environment. Make sure to select the correct environment before submitting documents.

creditNotesPage.title: Credit Notes
creditNotesPage.description: View the status of credit notes sent to DIAN.
creditNotesPage.noAccessDescription: You need workspace admin permissions to manage credit notes.

list.title: Issued credit notes
list.description: Credit notes processed to cancel invoices.

empty.title: No credit notes yet
empty.description: Credit notes are created from the details of a sent invoice.

creditNoteDetails.resendSuccess: Credit note successfully resent via email
creditNoteDetails.resendNotSupported: Resend requires at least one downloadable XML document.

creditNoteWizard.title: Create Credit Note

discrepancy.partialDesc: Cancels specific services from the original invoice.
discrepancy.fullDesc: Cancels all services from the original invoice.

creditNoteWizard.reasonPlaceholder: Describe the reason for the credit note...

step1.title: Reason & Resolution
step1.description: Select the credit note type and resolution to use.

step2.title: Select Items
step2.partialDesc: Select the patients and services to include in the credit note.
step2.fullDesc: All services will be included in the full cancellation.

step3.title: Review & Submit
step3.description: Verify the information before creating the credit note.
